phase_name: ARIS Infernus Minos Deterministic Verdict Gate
summary: INF-MINOS-01 reads the existing nemesis execution log, applies deterministic Minos threshold rules with llm_as_judge=false, emits a single block verdict JSON, carries forward the INF-BOT-01 and INF-MAT-01 SHA warnings, updates validator and tests to require the Minos verdict artifact, and keeps next_phase null.
